summary: Iteration 79 - Spanish supermarket category system testing completed. All 18 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend category dropdown with optgroup structure working. Main category filtering correctly includes subcategory products.

issues: Product images showing placeholder icons (broken Cloudinary URLs) - known issue from iteration 78

passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns status:ok, db:connected
GET /api/categories/tree?lang=es - returns 21 main categories
GET /api/categories/tree?lang=es - has 60 subcategories total
GET /api/categories/tree?lang=en - returns English display names (e.g., 'Meat & Eggs')
GET /api/categories/tree?lang=es - returns Spanish display names (e.g., 'Carnes y huevos')
Categories have proper optgroup structure (level, parent_id, children)
GET /api/products - returns all 9 real products
Filter by main category slug (aceite-condimentos) includes subcategory products
Filter by subcategory slug (aceite-oliva) returns only that subcategory
Main category 'frutos-secos-snacks' includes barritas + snacks_salados products
Main category 'conservas' includes conservas_vegetales + mermeladas products
Main category 'bebidas' includes zumos products
Premium Olive Oil assigned to cat_aceite_oliva
Energy Bars assigned to cat_barritas
Fig Jam assigned to cat_mermeladas
Orange Juice assigned to cat_zumos
Sun-Dried Tomatoes assigned to cat_conservas_vegetales
Popcorn assigned to cat_snacks_salados
Products page loads with 9 products displayed
Category dropdown shows grouped categories with optgroup structure (21 groups)
Homepage category icons link to correct /products?category=slug URLs
Filtering by main category from URL (?category=frutos-secos-snacks) shows 5 products
critical_code_review_comments: Category tree API properly supports ES/EN/KO translations via name_i18n field
Backend filter correctly queries by slug and includes subcategories when main category selected
ProductsPage.js properly uses optgroup elements for grouped category display
HomePage.js category icons correctly use Spanish slug values (aceite-condimentos, carnes-huevos, etc.)
seed_data_creation: None - tested existing products and categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 verified the new Spanish supermarket category system: 1) 21 main categories + 60 subcategories confirmed. 2) Category tree API supports ES/EN/KO translations via ?lang= parameter. 3) Products correctly assigned: olive oil->cat_aceite_oliva, energy bars->cat_barritas, jam->cat_mermeladas, juice->cat_zumos, tomatoes->cat_conservas_vegetales, popcorn->cat_snacks_salados. 4) Main category filter includes all subcategory products (e.g., frutos-secos-snacks shows barritas + snacks_salados = 5 products). 5) Frontend dropdown uses optgroup structure. 6) Homepage category icons link correctly to /products?category=<slug>.
